paper_title: Paternity and Paternal Analysis in Seed Orchards

methods.description: Paternity analysis was conducted using the CERVUS 3.0 software to determine the most probable paternal candidates for offspring based on genetic data. This method helps in understanding the genetic contribution of different paternal clones in a seed orchard.

steps.description: Ten thousand simulations were performed with 95% (strict) and 80% (loose) confidence levels.
steps.searchable_summary: perform simulations in CERVUS with specified confidence levels

steps.description: The critical LOD score was obtained by analyzing the simulated materials.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate critical LOD score from simulation results

steps.description: The candidate father ratio and mistyped genotyping were set to 0.85 and 0.01, respectively, and the minimum number of loci was seven.
steps.searchable_summary: set parameters for candidate father ratio, mistyped genotyping, and minimum loci

steps.description: Estimate the pollen contamination based on the individuals that do not match the father in the paternal analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate pollen contamination from unmatched individuals

methods.description: Estimation of the male effective population size (Ne) using genetic data to compare the effective population size between orchards' crops and offspring population.

steps.description: Estimate the male effective population size (Ne) following Funda et al. (2008).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate male effective population size using Funda et al. method

steps.description: Estimate Ne with the linkage disequilibrium (LD) method in the program LDNE.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Ne using linkage disequilibrium method in LDNE

methods.description: Collection of site data and genetic samples from a seed orchard to provide context and material for genetic analysis.

steps.description: Collect site data including location, climate, and orchard design.
steps.searchable_summary: gather site data such as location and climate

steps.description: Collect seeds and mark the location of mother trees.
steps.searchable_summary: collect seeds and mark mother tree locations

steps.description: Collect young leaves of seedlings for DNA extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: collect young leaves for DNA extraction
